questions.question: If you are in a hurry,
options: you may speed
you don't have to obey the traffic rules
you still have to comply with the traffic rules

good lifestyle

not my problem, so hurry and leave

questions.question: Which of the following descriptions about the safe distance is incorrect?

options: legal

mind our own business and do nothing

options: can legally pull a cart or trailer;
cannot legally pull a cart or trailer;

If a drunk driver causes serious injury or death, what is the penalty?
options: Their driver's license will be suspended;

They will be fined, their driver's license will be cancelled, and they will be permanently barred from possessing a driver's license (except for those who meet certain criteria and whose suspension has expired in accordance with requirements stipulated by the government);

may not sit side-saddle on the back seat
